completed_tasks.name: Auto-generate CONTEXT.md and DISCUSSION-LOG.md (--auto mode)
completed_tasks.note: Artifacts written but uncommitted at pause time

remaining_tasks.name: Execute the 13-library Foundation slice in strict dep order

human_actions_pending.context: Phase 1 discuss-phase artifacts must land before plan-phase

decisions.decision: Strict 13-step dependency order is a hard rule (paths -> atomic-write -> lock -> doi -> http -> budget -> migrations -> pii -> session-log -> state -> library -> checkpoint -> runtime)
decisions.rationale: ROADMAP §1 mandates strict order; ARCHITECTURE three-ring model collapses if a later lib lands first

decisions.decision: Atomic write contract: write tmp -> fsync(tmp) -> rename -> fsync(dir); chokepoint lint bans direct fs.writeFile outside bin/lib/atomic-write.ts
decisions.rationale: PRD §14 + Pitfall 4 — dir-fsync is the silent-data-loss landmine on sync-folder pause

decisions.decision: Lock file lives at LOCAL_DATA_DIR/pensmith/locks/${sha256(path).slice(0,16)}.lock — never inside .paper/
decisions.rationale: OneDrive non-negotiable (CLAUDE.md); dev folder is inside OneDrive and would eat in-.paper locks

decisions.decision: DOI normalization: single chokepoint, ordered spec, ASCII-only case-fold, both canonical+as-cited stored, fast-check property test
HTTP client: undici@^7 + p-retry@^6 + per-source TTL disk cache + per-source rate-limit floors + WARN-once on missing PENSMITH_CONTACT_EMAIL
decisions.rationale: STACK.md verdict; node-fetch/axios/got explicitly rejected; PRD §12 says free basics work without email

next_action: Commit Phase 1 discuss-phase artifacts, then run /gsd-plan-phase 1 --auto
context_notes: Phase 0 (Repo skeleton) shipped 2026-05-07 with 4/4 plans green and CI matrix passing 18/18. STATE.md still shows Phase 0 100% — needs update to mark Phase 0 closed and Phase 1 discuss-phase done. Discuss-phase ran in --auto mode, so all gray areas were resolved with recommended defaults (see DISCUSSION-LOG.md for the alternatives considered). Planner can proceed without re-prompting.
